title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 515.200 - Exceptions to report
text:
515.200.  Exceptions to report. — All exceptions to the report of the referees shall be in writing, and filed within four days, in term, after the report is filed, and shall be argued without delay.
(RSMo 1939 § 1158) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 992; 1919 § 1442; 1909 § 2012
